# Contributing

Target the current `dev-x` branch when opening PRs (there is almost always an active dev PR). If changes in `dev-x` conflict with your work, open an issue first.

## General

- Keep PRs to one issue
- Open an issue before large changes.
- Match existing code style or open an issue to discuss.

## AI

If you use AI tools:
- understand everything you submit
- review and rewrite generated code
- keep contributions maintainable
- do not submit obvious AI slop

## Dependencies

Do not add new dependencies without discussion first.

## Before submitting

Format the codebase with rustfmt and make sure the application actually runs.
